2026-06-02FINBank of Canada ActRe-appointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Bank of CanadaApproval of the re-appointment by the Minister of Finance of Ernest Daniels of West Kelowna, British Columbia, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Bank of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a term ending on February 28, 2029.N/A
subject: Re-appointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Bank of Canada
precis: Approval of the re-appointment by the Minister of Finance of Ernest Daniels of West Kelowna, British Columbia, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Bank of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a term ending on February 28, 2029.
